     The Numbers Business Report

Bloodshot (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,021,787Details
International Box Office $27,141,267
Worldwide Box Office $37,163,054
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,068,478
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $11,803,197
Total $18,871,675
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ray Garrison is a soldier recently killed in action and brought back to life as the superhero Bloodshot by the RST corporation. With an army of nanotechnology in his veins, he’s an unstoppable force –stronger than ever and able to heal instantly. But in controlling his body, the company has sway over his mind and memories, too. Now, Ray doesn’t know what’s real and what’s not — but he’s on a mission to find out.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,176,695 (91.6% of total gross)
Legs:1.09 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,861 opening theaters/2,861 max. theaters, 1.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,056,708

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 13th, 2020 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 29th, 2019 (Wide) (Germany)
March 5th, 2020 (Wide) (Switzerland)
March 6th, 2020 (Wide) (Portugal)
March 6th, 2020 (Wide) (Spain)
March 6th, 2020 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: March 24th, 2020 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
June 8th, 2020 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence, some suggestive material and language.
(Rating bulletin 2613 (Cert #52048), 1/22/2020)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Failed Franchises
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Faulty Memory, Revenge, Super Soldiers
Source material: Valiant Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Original Film, Valiant Productions, Bona Film Group, AnnaBell Pictures, The Hideaway Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Ray Garrison is a soldier recently killed in action and brought back to life as the superhero Bloodshot by the RST corporation. With an army of nanotechnology in his veins, he’s an unstoppable force –stronger than ever and able to heal instantly. But in controlling his body, the company has sway over his mind and memories, too. Now, Ray doesn’t know what’s real and what’s not — but he’s on a mission to find out.
